headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -64.8)
key_insights: Optimism trending down 21% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 128 quotes and 93 at strong intensity - people are really fired up today.

• The frustration score of 60.2 sits in the middle range for this period, showing sustained but not peak anger levels.

• Fears dropped further to -20.8 while optimism also declined, leaving frustrations as the clear emotional leader.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
